did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is an author correction for a study titled 'Weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma using graph-transformer on whole slide images.' The original study utilized a graph-transformer (a deep learning/AI method) for the dermatology task of detecting and classifying basal cell carcinoma in whole slide images.

is_this_paper_a_review_paper_or_a_resear.details: The document is an 'Author Correction' for an original research article titled 'Weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma using graph-transformer on whole slide images.' The correction addresses missing values in Table 2 of the original study, which involved original experimental work using deep learning (graph-transformer) for medical image analysis. It is not a review paper.

title: Author Correction: Weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma using graph‑transformer on whole slide images
brief_summary: This document is an author correction for a study titled 'Weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma using graph-transformer on whole slide images.' The original research utilized a graph-transformer deep learning model to detect and classify basal cell carcinoma in whole slide images. The correction addresses missing values in Table 2 of the original publication, specifically within the 'WSIs' columns for the training and validation sets. The authors provide the correct numerical data for the number of cases and whole slide images used in the experimental setup. This correction ensures the accuracy of the dataset statistics reported in the original scientific report. The original article remains valid except for these specific data corrections.

lesion_types_studied.details: The paper is an author correction for a study titled 'Weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma using graph-transformer on whole slide images.' The original study focused on detecting and classifying basal cell carcinoma.

all_task_types.target: Basal cell carcinoma in whole slide images
all_task_types.details: The paper title explicitly states 'Weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma using graph-transformer on whole slide images.' The correction addresses dataset statistics (number of cases and WSIs) for the original study which performed detection.
The paper title explicitly states 'Weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma'. The original study utilized a graph-transformer for classification tasks.

datasets_used.name: Whole Slide Images (WSIs) dataset
datasets_used.description: A collection of whole slide images used for the weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma. The specific source (e.g., hospital or public repository) is not detailed in this author correction document, which only provides corrected statistical counts for the dataset used in the original study.

use.training: Used for training the graph-transformer model (369 cases, 1435 WSIs).
use.validation: Included in the 'Training and validation set' column in the correction table (369 cases, 1435 WSIs), but specific validation split counts are not explicitly separated from training in the provided text.

hypothesis_testing.interpretation: No hypothesis testing was reported; this document is an author correction addressing missing values in Table 2 of the original study.

basal_cell_carcinoma_dataset.metric: Dataset Statistics (Number of Cases and Whole Slide Images)
basal_cell_carcinoma_dataset.notes: This document is an author correction addressing missing values in Table 2 of the original study. It provides corrected counts for the dataset used in the weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma. The original incorrect values were 4744 cases and 2593 WSIs; the corrected values are 4745 cases and 2594 WSIs. Specific subgroup counts were also corrected (e.g., subgroup with 219 cases had 506 WSIs instead of the incorrect 178 WSIs listed in the 'WSIs' column for that row in the incorrect table, though the table structure in the correction text is ambiguous regarding which WSIs count corresponds to which case count for subgroups, the 'Correct' table lists: 219 cases/506 WSIs, 256 cases/581 WSIs, 81 cases/230 WSIs, 138 cases/276 WSIs, 138 cases/294 WSIs, 118 cases/287 WSIs). No performance metrics (e.g., accuracy, AUC) are reported in this correction document.

architecture_details.application: weakly supervised detection and classification of basal cell carcinoma on whole slide images

conclusions: The original publication contained missing values in the 'WSIs' column of Table 2, which have been corrected in this document.
The total number of cases for the study was corrected from 4,744 to 4,745, and the total number of whole slide images (WSIs) was corrected from 2,593 to 2,594.

Specific subgroup data were corrected, including the number of WSIs for the subgroup with 219 cases (corrected from 178 to 506) and the validation set WSIs for the subgroup with 475 cases (corrected from 842 to 841).
The original article remains valid except for these specific statistical corrections regarding dataset counts.
important_remarks: This document is an Author Correction addressing missing values in the 'WSIs' column of Table 2 in the original publication.
The total number of cases was corrected from 4,744 to 4,745, and the total number of whole slide images (WSIs) was corrected from 2,593 to 2,594.

Specific subgroup data were corrected, including the number of WSIs for the subgroup with 219 cases (corrected from 178 to 506) and the validation set WSIs for the subgroup with 475 cases (corrected from 842 to 841).
The original article remains valid except for these specific statistical corrections regarding dataset counts.
No performance metrics, statistical significance, or clinical validation results are reported in this correction document; it solely addresses dataset enumeration errors.
